cubes.title: How to Remove Red Wine Stains from Carpet
rules: MUST blot the stain immediately with a clean cloth
PROHIBITED using hot water, as it sets the stain
WARNING: avoid rubbing, as it spreads the stain
cubes.rationale: Quick action increases chances of complete stain removal

cubes.title: How to Meditate for Beginners
rules: MUST find a quiet, comfortable space free from distractions
PROHIBITED expecting immediate mastery; progress takes consistent practice
WARNING: Avoid forcing concentration, as it may cause frustration
cubes.rationale: Provides foundational steps to establish a sustainable meditation practice
